anchor:
QA Engineer - Automation Framework Architect Needed

We are currently searching for an enthusiastic QA Engineer with a strong focus on automation framework development to join our dynamic project team. ideal candidate will be proficient in Selenium, Cypress, and JUnit, demonstrating expertise in designing and implementing scalable and maintainable test frameworks.

Responsibilities include:

- Collaborating with product managers and development teams to design comprehensive testing strategies
- Building and maintaining high-quality automated test suites using Selenium, Cypress, and JUnit
- Automating manual tests to reduce execution time and improve coverage
- Analyzing test results to identify and report defects in a timely manner
- Providing guidance and coaching to less experienced team members on automation best practices

Requirements:

- At least 5 years of experience in QA testing with a strong background in automation using Selenium, Cypress, and JUnit
- Profound knowledge of test automation principles, methodologies, and tools 
- Demonstrated ability to design, implement, and maintain large-scale test suites
- Excellent analytical skills for identifying and resolving complex testing issues
- Strong problem-solving abilities and an adeptness for writing clean, reusable code
- Proven experience with Continuous Integration/Continuous Delivery (CI/CD) practices

Preferred Skils:

- Experience in creating and maintaining documentation for test frameworks and processes
- Knowledge of Agile methodologies and DevOps principles
- Familiarity with cloud-based testing on platforms such as AWS or Azure
- Basic understanding of security testing and compliance considerations

This role is based out of San Francisco, CA, but we are open to highly motivated remote candidates on a case-by-case basis.

If you are passionate about automating the QA process and have a proven track record in developing scalable test solutions, please submit your resume for immediate consideration.
